name: verify-punditry
description: GCP Cloud Function — verifies daily punditry snippets exist and sends Discord notification

scripts.deploy: npm run build && gcloud functions deploy verify-punditry --gen2 --runtime nodejs20 --trigger-http --no-allow-unauthenticated --entry-point verifyPunditry --region europe-west2 --timeout 30s --memory 128MB --set-secrets SUPABASE_URL=SUPABASE_URL:latest,SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY=SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY:latest,DISCORD_WEBHOOK_URL=DISCORD_WEBHOOK_URL:latest --set-env-vars TOURNAMENT_SLUG=world-cup-2026
